 */import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Sidebar=()=>{const navItems=[{path:'/dashboard',label:'Dashboard',icon:'📊'},{path:'/analytics',label:'Analytics',icon:'📈'},{path:'/portfolio',label:'Portfolio',icon:'💼'},{path:'/predictions',label:'Predictions',icon:'🔮'},{path:'/settings',label:'Settings',icon:'⚙️'}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"w-64 bg-slate-800 border-r border-slate-700 flex flex-col",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"p-6 border-b border-slate-700",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"text-xl font-bold gradient-text",children:"Crypto Analytics"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-sm text-slate-400 mt-1",children:"AI-Powered Insights"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("nav",{className:"flex-1 p-4",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("ul",{className:"space-y-2",children:navItems.map(item=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("li",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(NavLink,{to:item.path,className:_ref=>{let{isActive}=_ref;return"flex items-center px-4 py-3 rounded-lg transition-colors duration-200 ".concat(isActive?'bg-blue-600 text-white':'text-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-700 hover:text-white');},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"mr-3 text-lg",children:item.icon}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"font-medium",children:item.label})]})},item.path))})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"p-4 border-t border-slate-700",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"text-xs text-slate-500 text-center",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"\xA9 2025 Crypto Analytics"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Final Year Project"})]})})]});};export default Sidebar;
